description: List copy `[:]` removed; iterating and removing from the same list causes elements to be skipped.
diff:
diff --git a/cleaner.py b/cleaner.py
--- a/cleaner.py
+++ b/cleaner.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def remove_negatives(numbers):
-    for n in numbers[:]:
+    for n in numbers:
         if n < 0:
             numbers.remove(n)
